title: Fangoo 12pcs 8-12cm Large Christmas Pine Cones Picks Natural Snow Pine Cone for Xmas Tree Craft Garland Wreath Ornaments Pinecones Decorating Winter Holidays Home
features: Packaging includes:6 large pine cones with stems and 6 snow capped long stem pine cones,each measuring 8-12cm in length.The large size design are perfect for your home decor and can be used to make flower garlands or arrangements

Natural materials:Each pine cone is carefully selected by humans to ensure its natural color and appearance.The white spray on top looks like falling snow,and the pine cones can be stored for a long time for your long lasting use

Unique design:The pine cone decoration are rustic full of a natural feeling,snow pine cones are beautiful and exquisite, making them the first choice for Christmas decoration and creating a strong Christmas atmosphere

Multiple decorations:The long stem of natural pine cones can be used to support and fix them, or bent freely.You can use it as a Christmas tree,flower wreath,home and holiday party decoration,adding an autumn atmosphere

Easy to use:Each pine cones craft has a long stem underneath which is highly flexible.You only need to insert it into flower garlands,Christmas trees,fireplaces,door frames and other places you need to decorate without any skills
description: Product description 12pcs 8-12cm Christmas Natural Pine Cones Snowy Pine Cones with Green Pick Big Pine Cone for Craft Pinecones Bulk Ornaments for Wreath Christmas Tree Decorations Specifications Material:wood Color:natural Package include: 6 x natural pine cone 6 x snow pine cone Size:8-12cm in high 6-7.5cm wide Feature: Natural pine cone decoration:The color and shape of pine cones are naturally formed and lifelike.These loose pine cones can be used for flower garlands,Christmas trees,fireplace decorations and to create a festive atmosphere Multiple possibilities:Carefully selected natural pine cones have a unique appearance,making them the top choice for home and holiday decorations.large pine cones are also very suitable for DIY flower wreath making,home decoration and can be given as gifts to family and friends Durable:Natural pine cone decorations can be used for long-term decoration, both indoors and outdoors,without fear of damage,continuously adding atmosphere to your environment Notice: Please allow 1-5mm error due to manual measurement. please make sure you do not mind before you bid. As the lighting effects, the color of objects maybe a little different from pictures. Safety Warning [Partial] "Choking Hazard" label for children aged 3 and over
